title: StructTuple
description: Structural-dynamics fingerprint of a company at a point in time. Maps a company to one of the V4 universality classes plus critical-point state, supporting evidence, and early-warning indicators. Used by the Phase Detector product to drive screener / report / projections.

ticker.description: Stock ticker symbol, e.g. AAPL. Uppercase. Exchange-prefix optional (e.g. NYSE:JPM).

company_name.description: Legal or common name. Optional but recommended.

as_of_date.description: Snapshot date in YYYY-MM-DD. A StructTuple is point-in-time; multiple snapshots track structural drift.

dynamics_family.description: Which V4 universality class best describes this company's growth/risk dynamics.

critical_point_state.description: Where the company sits relative to its phase-transition / bifurcation point right now.

structural_summary.description: 30-second TL;DR for end users. Plain English. No jargon explosions.

confidence.description: Model self-reported confidence that this StructTuple is correct. Calibrated downstream.

evidence_anchors.description: Public facts grounding the dynamics_family + critical_point_state assignments. Each anchor is a concrete fact that an analyst could verify.

fact.description: Concrete claim, e.g. 'iOS app store revenue grew 15% CAGR 2020-2025'.

source.description: Where this fact is verifiable, e.g. '10-K 2025 segment breakdown' or 'Statista 2025'.

metric_value.description: Optional numeric anchor, e.g. '15% CAGR' or '$394B 2025 revenue'.

early_warning_indicators.description: Critical Slowing Down (CSD) and related early-warning signals. From Scheffer et al. 2009 'Early-warning signals for critical transitions'.

ar1_trend.description: Trend in lag-1 autocorrelation of a relevant time series. Rising = CSD positive.

variance_trend.description: Trend in rolling variance. Rising = approach to bifurcation.

tail_exponent_drift.description: Whether the return / cashflow tail is getting heavier (more critical) or thinner.

v4_class_alignment.description: Mapping to V4 taxonomy v2 classes (from B3 ensemble). Key = class_id, value = membership probability 0-1. Filled in by next-session pipeline.
